text: We just got back from the hotel, or from downtown. Got to our hotel, and the roof from the other building right next to us was blown off, hitting our roof and our wall and windows. And the roof, our hotel below us, was ripped off, and it was hitting our stuff. And yeah, it was pretty scary, really. I don't know. I hope everyone's all right. Yeah, we, like you said, we walked downstairs, and there was everyone was in the stairway and huddled up. Look, like I don't think anyone in our hotel really got hurt, but definitely windows knocked out and roofs gone, leaking all over in the hotel. When you walk out and see this damage, I mean, did you picture this is what you'd see after the storm moved through? No, not all. It was really quick, actually. It came through, and I figured it was pretty bad, but not nearly as bad as this. As fast it went through.
